title: DEMAND RESPONSE - 211info
text: DIAL-A-BUS DEMAND RESPONSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation for individuals who need a ride for any reason. 4077 SW Research Way Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Adults 18 and older who do not qualify for Benton Area Transit Lift Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm. Rides may be provided outside of these hours. Follows the Corvallis School District inclement weather closure policy and closed on federal holidays. Email (541) 752-2615 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-2615 Main phone Main phone (541) 752-2615 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Rides are based on distance, time, and a sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: General Paratransit/Community Ride Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - LINN COUNTY MEDICAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIAL-A-BUS
